site.name: AIdeator
site.tagline: Local-first idea validation with investor-grade, privacy-safe reports.

/.title: AIdeator - Local-First Idea Validation Engine
/.description: Validate startup ideas with demand, competition, risk, and next-step cards while keeping idea text local by default.

/docs/.title: AIdeator Docs - Modes, Methodology, and Outputs
/docs/.description: Read how AIdeator modes work, where signals come from, and how report cards and markdown artifacts are produced.

/compare/.title: AIdeator vs Ad-hoc Validation - Compare Workflows
/compare/.description: Compare AIdeator against manual research and generic AI prompting for traceability, privacy controls, and repeatability.

/about/.title: About AIdeator - Why Local-First Validation
/about/.description: Learn why AIdeator focuses on local-first validation, explicit mode boundaries, and auditable market signals.

/changelog/.title: AIdeator Changelog - Product Releases
/changelog/.description: Track AIdeator feature releases, validation improvements, and reporting updates.

/blog/.title: AIdeator Blog - Validation Playbooks
/blog/.description: Practical playbooks for testing startup ideas, improving signal quality, and presenting investor-grade findings.

/waitlist/.title: AIdeator Early Access - Join Waitlist
/waitlist/.description: Join the AIdeator early access list to test local-first idea validation workflows with your own startup concepts.

/install/.title: AIdeator Install - Local Setup Quickstart
/install/.description: Install AIdeator locally and run your first validation in local-only mode with explicit outbound controls.

/product/.title: AIdeator Product - Validation Workflow Overview
/product/.description: Explore AIdeator flow from idea intake to report generation, including mode guardrails and traceable evidence.

/features/.title: AIdeator Features - Demand, Competition, Risk, Next Steps
/features/.description: Explore the full AIdeator feature set, including report cards, mode controls, and markdown artifacts for review.

/signin/.title: AIdeator Sign In
/signin/.description: Sign in to AIdeator to access your validation runs, reports, and settings.

/privacy/.title: AIdeator Privacy

/pricing/.description: Choose AIdeator pricing for solo founders, product teams, and organizations needing governed idea validation.
